pages.text: Alliums infused with amethyst mana didn’t do well in fermentation, so you replace grapes with sweet berries. For alcohol concentration, you use ectoplasm to catalyze nether warts.$(br)Grants the consumer: $(br)$(li)30 seconds of Stimulation and Swiftness II

pages.title: Tidbits
pages.text: “What, the legendary Vizier was no match for a single warrior?”
